title: Accent color (blue)
description: Primary accent: pp number, graph start, highlights.

title: Accent color 2 (purple)
description: Secondary accent: mod chips and the far end of the graph gradient.

title: Panel opacity
description: Opacity of the frosted panel background (0-100).

title: Tagline
description: Small watermark text over the graph (e.g. your name or a catchphrase). Leave blank to hide.

title: Show player strip
description: Show the avatar / username / rank / total pp strip along the top.

title: Show session stats
description: Show pp gained + play count for this session in the player strip. Off by default.

title: Show map background
description: Show the blurred beatmap background behind the counter.

title: Show unstable rate
description: Show the live unstable rate (UR) during play.

title: Show SS pp instead of if-FC
description: Use the pp value for an SS (100%) instead of pp-if-FC as the secondary pp number.

title: Dim when paused
description: Gently dim the counter when the game is paused or unfocused.

title: Miss color
description: Color of the miss judgement counter.
